expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves donut-label assumptions for label visibility, density limits, and overlap-sensitive presentation
expectations.evidence: The result.md states the focus requirement but concludes it is "Not demonstrated / insufficient evidence" and notes the evidence bundle lacks explicit mention of label visibility rules, density limits, and overlap behavior. It further says no Phase 1 spawn manifest artifact is provided to show the orchestrator would seek/retain that context.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md: "Phase 1 (spawn planning + context intake contract). No Phase 2+ artifacts were assumed or generated." result.md frames itself as "Phase 1 Contract Check" and discusses Phase 1 spawn planning/context intake constraints without producing later-phase plans.
